Headline: #85 Central Temporary Reroute at Central/Grand
ShortDescription: #85 Central buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Central, Grand, Laramie, North Avenue and Central due to street blockage near Central/Grand.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

#85 Central buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Central, Grand, Laramie, North Avenue, then resume their normal route on Central.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to street blockage near Central/Grand.

Headline: #65 Grand Temporary Reroute near Central/Grand
ShortDescription: #65 Grand buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions due to street blockage near Central/Grand.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

#65 Grand buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions. Buses will operate as follows:

  • Westbound buses will operate via Grand, Central, Fullerton, Austin, then resume their normal route on Grand.
  • Eastbound buses will operate via Grand, Central, North Avenue, Laramie,, then resume their normal route on Central.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to street blockage near Central/Grand.
